arts.ttl: Southampton 2-3 Leicester City: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Saints humiliated in relegation six-pointer
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at the highlights, man of the match, and stats from Saturday's Premier League clash between Southampton and Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Russell Martin on brink after Southampton crumble against Leicester
arts.sum: Southampton 2-3 Leicester: The Saints boss is under more pressure after his team gave up a two-goal advantage in this crucial Premier League fixture

arts.ttl: 2-0 down, win 3-2 | Leicester's 98th-minute winner breaks Saints hearts
arts.sum: FREE TO WATCH: Highlights from Leicester's win against Southampton in the Premier League.

Jordan Ayew scored in the 98th minute as Leicester staged a second-half comeback to earn a 3-2 win at Southampton in the Premier League on Saturday, with the 10-man hosts setting a club record of 21 matches without victory in the English top-flight.

arts.ttl: Winless Southampton stunned by thrilling Leicester fightback
arts.sum: Leicester scored three second-half goals to come from behind and stun 10-player Southampton, denying them a first Premier League win of the season after a gripping 3-2 success at St Mary's.

arts.ttl: Leicester win from two goals down to pile on the misery for struggling Saints
arts.sum: The Foxes were 3-2 winners in Hampshire.

arts.ttl: Leicester ratings v Southampton as Fatawu the game-changer in amazing comeback
arts.sum: But Fatawu set up Facundo Buonanotte to give City hope, and then Jamie Vardy slammed in a penalty for 2-2, with Ryan Fraser sent off a goal-line shirt tug on the number nine as he tried to tap in. City needed goals after the break, but they started the second half nearly scoring into their own net, Faes spectacularly heading towards his own goal, with Hermansen instinctively tipping it over.

arts.ttl: Leicester City transfer details revealed as Mads Hermansen opens up on 'unique situation'
arts.sum: A few years of scouting and a deal conducted in secret helped Leicester City secure one of their best signings in recent seasons in Mads Hermansen. Showing the work required to find gems like Hermansen, the goalkeeper has revealed that City’s scouts watched him for a few years, while he was playing for Denmark’s youth sides and then for Brondby.

arts.sum: Southampton and Leicester will go head-to-head in a huge Premier League clash on Saturday afternoon.
